title: Bridgerton

characters.name: Daphne Bridgerton
characters.archetype: The Diamond of the Season. The eldest daughter who must marry well. Marries the Duke of Hastings.

characters.name: Anthony Bridgerton
characters.archetype: The eldest brother. Viscount. Approaches every decision with a list. Falls anyway in season 2.

characters.name: Eloise Bridgerton
characters.archetype: The independent sister. Refuses the marriage market. Wants something more than to be a wife.

characters.name: Penelope Featherington
characters.archetype: Wallflower turned Lady Whistledown — the anonymous society writer everyone fears.

characters.name: Colin Bridgerton
characters.archetype: The wandering middle Bridgerton. Eventually realizes Penelope was always the one.

characters.name: Lady Danbury
characters.archetype: The Queen's confidante. Keeps everyone in line. Knows everything.

characters.name: Queen Charlotte
characters.archetype: The Queen of England. Declares the Diamond. Holds the social order in her hand.

characters.name: Simon Basset (Duke of Hastings)
characters.archetype: The Duke who refuses to marry. Eventually marries Daphne.

characters.name: Kate Sharma
characters.archetype: Anthony's match in season 2. Strong-willed, intelligent, the first to call him out.

signature_quotes: Dear reader, sources tell this author...
The Diamond of the Season has chosen.
scenes: Daphne and the Duke at the Trowbridge Ball — 'I burn for you.'
Anthony and Kate's confrontation in the rain.
The reveal of Penelope as Lady Whistledown.
The Queen at the diamond ceremony.
Eloise's first society debut — refusing it.
off_screen_drama: Regé-Jean Page left after season 1 — the show survived.
Nicola Coughlan's casting as the romantic lead in season 3 was a moment.
Shondaland production rumors swirl every season.
